data.content_ref:
inline:The content inventory fails to provide the actual explanatory copy and data required by the problem context, instead providing only brief fragments and labels.
The problem context explicitly requires the content inventory to 'supply the actual headings, labels, explanatory copy, facts, and data the page will display—not placeholders or descriptions'. Target A1 provides only a few short sentences (e.g., 'Helicase unwinds the strand; DNA Polymerase builds the new match') and headings. This is insufficient to serve as a complete content inventory from which a designer could work alone, as it omits the detailed explanatory copy necessary to explain replication and transcription visually as requested in the prompt.
